summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Shadow Cakes PWA features and import functionality. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features tested successfully including PWA assets, navigation, selling price input (no lag), margin calculation, Record a Sale flow, and Import page.
passed_tests: PWA manifest.json accessible with correct name, icons, display:standalone, theme_color (#2C1E16)
index.html has proper PWA meta tags (apple-mobile-web-app-capable, manifest link, theme-color)
Offline banner component exists (data-testid='offline-banner') - not visible when online (correct)
Install App button component exists (data-testid='install-pwa-btn') - conditional on beforeinstallprompt
CSV import for ingredients works: POST /api/import/ingredients
XLSX import for ingredients works: POST /api/import/ingredients
CSV import for packaging stores store_vendor, purchase_price, package_size, purchase_date correctly
CSV import for recipes works: POST /api/import/recipes
CSV import for components works: POST /api/import/components
Recipe detail page selling price input allows typing without lag (0.37s for 5 chars)
Calculate margin button correctly calculates profit margin (82.1% for $45.99 selling price)
Sidebar navigation works for all pages (Sales Dashboard, Recipes, Ingredients, Packaging, Components, Import, Settings)
Record a Sale flow works from recipe detail page - sale recorded successfully
Import page has all tabs (Ingredients, Recipes, Packaging, Components)
Settings page loads with labour/utility rate configuration
All API endpoints return correct status codes and data structures
test_credentials: No authentication required - single-user personal tool
seed_data_creation: Test data created via CSV imports: TEST_Flour, TEST_Sugar, TEST_Butter, TEST_Cocoa, TEST_Vanilla, TEST_Chocolate Cake recipe, TEST_Cream Cheese Frosting component, TEST_Cake Box 8inch packaging
context_for_next_testing_agent: PWA features fully implemented and tested. CSV/XLSX imports work correctly for all entity types. Packaging import now correctly stores store_vendor, purchase_price, package_size, purchase_date fields. Selling price input uses useRef to prevent re-render lag. The beforeinstallprompt event won't fire in Playwright (requires real browser with HTTPS + manifest + service worker), but the Install App button component is correctly implemented with conditional rendering.
